title: f/2 Vitamin Solution Preparation
author: Christa Smith
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jv7cn9n

steps.title: Measure 950 mL dH 2 O...
steps.instruction: Measure 950 mL dH 2 O into a 1 L glass bottle.

steps.title: Add 10 mL primary stock solution of biotin (vit
steps.instruction: Add 10 mL primary stock solution of biotin (vit. H) (0.1 g/L in dH 2 O) into the bottle.

steps.title: Add 1 mL primary stock solution of cyanocobalamin (vit
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL primary stock solution of cyanocobalamin (vit. B12) (1.0 g/L in dH 2 O) into the bottle.

steps.title: Bring the final volume to 1...
steps.instruction: Bring the final volume to 1 L with dH 2 O.

steps.title: Filter sterilize final vitamin solution through a 0
steps.instruction: Filter sterilize final vitamin solution through a 0.2 micron PES membrane.

steps.title: Dissolve 200 mg thiamine·HCl (vit
steps.instruction: Dissolve 200 mg thiamine·HCl (vit. B1) into the bottle.
